invariants: albedo is SH degree-0 ONLY — never bake higher SH orders into albedo (exports)
all PLY byte read/write lives only in precompute/core/ply_io.py; a schema change bumps schema.SCHEMA_VERSION AND updates the Godot importer in the SAME commit
the COLMAP->Godot coordinate conversion happens exactly once, in export; if an asset renders flipped/rotated the bug is in export, never patched Godot-side

never modify or delete SOURCE data: datasets/ and /media/lukas/gg/photoscan are read-only; assets/raw/<name>/ is the ingest WORKSPACE — stages may create derived outputs there (frames, colmap db/model) but never touch source clips or another asset's directory
no per-frame neural networks at runtime — runtime shading is the cheap Godot compute pass only
never edit the vendored plugin godot/addons/gdgs/ except via a diff recorded in docs/decisions.md
every pipeline stage writes a metrics.json with a check that FAILS if the stage broke; no stage is done without one
decompose must re-render held-out views within a fixed dB budget of train_base (else the decomposition is wrong)
on the trader GPU box (private endpoint in the reference-gpu-servers memory): verify the target GPU is idle before starting, run at low priority, never OOM or kill others' processes

ui.engine: n/a — the 'UI' is Godot GPU renders, not a web app; visual checks go through the flow-verifier on render PNGs (relight/tools/*.gd on DISPLAY=:0), not the web visual judge
